title: 30 10 trailers edited together in chronological order
display_title: 30 10 trailers edited together in chronological order
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 05, 2021 8:25 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SVf4SLOzhwA Courtesy of Reichu, who used the cut and scene numbers from Trailer 2 to edit all the trailers seen so far into chronological order, complete with zany Icelandic music! We now have a good basis for figuring out where each of the scenes we've seen fits in the movie, as well as slotting any future trailer or TV spot scenes.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Feb 05, 2021 9:51 pm Well, it's makig some assumptions, but so would any attempt at this point

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by The_Max » Sat Feb 06, 2021 5:18 am This seems like a summary of the whole movie but I bet half of the scenes are not in the actual movie or their environment/context will be quite different to what can be assumed from this.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Feb 06, 2021 7:00 am Eh. This is the best substitute for a movie we have so far. I appreciate the effort. Now if only Khara would release AVANT 1 in HD......

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Feb 06, 2021 8:41 am The_Max wrote: This seems like a summary of the whole movie but I bet half of the scenes are not in the actual movie or their environment/context will be quite different to what can be assumed from this.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Feb 06, 2021 8:58 am It's a great presumption, but there are some scenes that I thought in a different order.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by dzzthink » Thu Feb 11, 2021 8:49 pm I would think that maybe gendo appears later in the movie. Right when Shinji is there. Also why would toddler Asuka be at the end? I'd put it right when Asuka is reflecting about life on the wooden stand
summary: []: 3.0 + 1.0 trailers edited together in chronological order             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 05, 2021 8:25 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SVf4SLOzhwA Courtesy of Reichu, who used the cut and scene numbers from Trailer 2 to edit all the trailers seen so far into chronological order, complete with zany Icelandic music!
